question: Full bounded investigation for six high-balance RXRP repump wallets: classify recent activity, repeated counterparties, transfer samples, and whether any wallet shows re-arm, deployer preparation, consolidation, or unrelated trading churn.

notes: No Arkham intelligence/label endpoints are used in this run.
Arkham transfer calls are Solana-only, subject-filtered, time-bounded, limit-capped, and non-paginated.
Nansen counterparties are aggregate triage only until transaction-level evidence confirms any link.
Helius parses only signatures already selected by the prior wallet-review artifact.
